---
title: My Website Portfolio Project
subtitle: Proposal Presentation
author: Nicole Bewley-Hudson
institute: IBM 3202, Cal Poly Pomona
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: black
    slide-number: true
    center: false
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    footer: My Website Portfolio
    transition: slide
    transition-speed: default
    incremental: false
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 1
    scrollable: true
    smaller: true
    code-fold: false
    code-overflow: wrap
editor: visual
execute:
  echo: true
freeze: auto
---

## Introduction

Welcome to my **Market Analysis & Control Portfolio Website Project**.

Welcome to my portfolio website proposal for IBM 3202 Market Analysis and Control. The purpose of this website is to showcase the projects and analytical skills I developed throughout this course using R, Quarto, and data analytics tools. The website will function as a professional portfolio demonstrating my ability to perform data wrangling, create data visualizations, build dashboards, and communicate insights using reproducible reports.

Each section of the website will highlight assignments completed during the course, including data visualization projects, data wrangling exercises, interactive presentations, and analytics tools used to analyze marketing data.
